query: Greater London mid-2024 population estimate 2024 ONS 9,000,000
answer: As of mid-2024, Greater London's population is estimated at 9.0 million. This estimate is based on the latest data from the Office for National Statistics.

Picture of a cog representing settings for the web site. # Population estimates. # New 2024 estimates for England & Wales. New mid-2024 population estimates for England and Wales by local authority, age and sex are available on Nomis from 30 Jul 2025. In addition, revisions have been made to mid-2022 and mid-2023 population estimates to incorporate improved international and internal migration data. Population estimates for 2024 are currently only available for areas in England and Wales. ONS plan to release a full set of UK population estimates for mid-2024 in autumn 2025. For further information, see the ONS statistical bulletin Population estimates for England and Wales: mid-2024. **Accessing the population estimates dataset:**.
